offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, late payments cause cash flow gaps. We predict cash flow and notify teams instead of manual tracking of invoices and payments.
problem: Late payments causing cash flow gaps
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about cash flow
DM 20-50 Etsy sellers with demo video
Join forums for Etsy sellers sharing tools
try_it: Let users try cash flow predictions on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
